summary: Executed backend + frontend regression focused on Drawing Analyzer enhancements (calibration, confidence, history, compare) and core module page loads. All targeted backend tests passed; frontend flows passed including PNG/JPG/PDF analyze, history compare, and report download.
action_items: Create /app/memory/test_credentials.md (currently missing) to satisfy auth-testing precondition for future agents.
critical_code_review_comments: Missing required test credential artifact: /app/memory/test_credentials.md was not found.
Reports page intentionally renders an empty-state container when no estimate exists; test suites should assert either reports-page or reports-empty-state-card.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_* drawing analyses through API/UI runs (PNG/JPG/PDF).
context_for_next_testing_agent: History table now includes many TEST_* entries generated in this run. Calibration object was validated via backend response (reference_length_m present). UI calibration display may still show scale 1x when drawing lacks dimensions, which is expected fallback behavior.
rca of the issue: No product defects found in scoped features. One apparent UI regression on /reports was a test assertion mismatch: route loads empty-state card when latestEstimate is absent, so looking only for reports-page causes false negatives.
